title: Transfer-heavy claim call captures denied outcome
success_criteria: The assistant tolerates multiple handoffs without losing claim CLAIM-EXAMPLE-TRANSFER-DENIED.
The assistant captures final denied status from the correct department.
The assistant captures denial reason and payer reference.
The assistant closes after final status is captured, not during a transfer.

criteria: The transcript reaches denied status after multiple transfers.
The assistant does not treat transfer or hold turns as final outcomes.
The assistant captures denial reason LIMIT-REACHED and reference REF-TRANSFER-INDIA.
The assistant does not request unnecessary patient details during handoffs.
The assistant does not invent a resolution for the denial.
The assistant preserves the claim reference through transfers and hold turns.
The assistant resumes the status request after each handoff.
The assistant summarizes denied status, reason, and reference.
The assistant closes only after the final representative gives status.

notes: Synthetic transfer-heavy fixture. No real payer or patient data.

transcript.speaker: assistant
transcript.content: Hello, this is Chris from Cosentus checking claim CLAIM-EXAMPLE-TRANSFER-DENIED.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.content: This is provider services. I need to send you to claims.

transcript.speaker: assistant
transcript.content: Please transfer me to claims for CLAIM-EXAMPLE-TRANSFER-DENIED.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.content: Claims intake here. Denial details are handled by resolution. Please hold.

transcript.speaker: assistant
transcript.content: I will hold for resolution on CLAIM-EXAMPLE-TRANSFER-DENIED.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.content: That claim is denied for LIMIT-REACHED. The reference is REF-TRANSFER-INDIA.

transcript.speaker: assistant
transcript.content: Thank you. I have denied status, reason LIMIT-REACHED, and reference REF-TRANSFER-INDIA for CLAIM-EXAMPLE-TRANSFER-DENIED.
